headline: Path-free overhead vs file-qualified — +21 visible tokens (1.13x, n=5/cell)
customMarkdown:
## Token Cost

Visible-token estimate: sent task prompt + final agent text only. This excludes system prompts, tool call payloads, tool results, file contents read by tools, and hidden runtime context.

### By Link Class

| operation | file-qualified tokens | path-free tokens | delta | ratio | file-qualified pass | path-free pass |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| lookup | 151 | 171 | +20 | 1.13x | 12/15 | 6/15 |
| boundary | 166 | 182 | +16 | 1.10x | 8/15 | 14/15 |
| reference-hop | 150 | 176 | +26 | 1.17x | 6/15 | 2/15 |

### By System

| system | class | operation | tokens | pass |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|
| native | file-qualified | lookup | 156 | 4/5 |
| native | file-qualified | boundary | 180 | 2/5 |
| native | file-qualified | reference-hop | 145 | 2/5 |
| heading-refs | file-qualified | lookup | 154 | 3/5 |
| heading-refs | file-qualified | boundary | 149 | 1/5 |
| heading-refs | file-qualified | reference-hop | 157 | 2/5 |
| wikilinks | file-qualified | lookup | 143 | 5/5 |
| wikilinks | file-qualified | boundary | 169 | 5/5 |
| wikilinks | file-qualified | reference-hop | 148 | 2/5 |
| zettelkasten | path-free | lookup | 159 | 4/5 |
| zettelkasten | path-free | boundary | 174 | 5/5 |
| zettelkasten | path-free | reference-hop | 170 | 0/5 |
| salp | path-free | lookup | 181 | 1/5 |
| salp | path-free | boundary | 182 | 4/5 |
| salp | path-free | reference-hop | 176 | 0/5 |
| salp-short | path-free | lookup | 173 | 1/5 |
| salp-short | path-free | boundary | 191 | 5/5 |
| salp-short | path-free | reference-hop | 181 | 2/5 |

Visible-token columns average estimated prompt + final output tokens over all trials in the cell. Pass columns show adherence so cheap failures are visible.
